rotate.title: Please rotate your device
rotate.body: BUILD-A-BOX is designed for landscape. Rotate your phone or tablet sideways for the best experience.

congrats.heading: CONGRATULATIONS!
congrats.lede_html:
YOU ARE IN CHARGE OF DESIGNING PACKAGING SOLUTIONS
FOR SMURFIT WESTROCK CUSTOMERS.
congrats.body_html:
SELECT THE DESIGN FEATURES THAT BEST FULFILL THE ASSIGNED MISSION
AND CREATE THE IDEAL SOLUTION TO STAND OUT AT THE POINT OF SALE.

rules.line1_html:
Travel through 3 portals to choose the
features of your packaging design.
rules.line2_html: When you make your choice, the door will light up red — click it to advance.

mission.intro_html: In BUILD-A-BOX, you are responsible for designing packaging solutions for Smurfit Westrock customers.
mission.body_html: Select the design features that best meet the assigned mission and create the ideal solution to stand out at the point of sale.

client.intro_html:
Monster Snacks is a recognized brand in the market.
Currently have no presence in club stores.
objectives_html: Position their flagship snack (Cheese Flavor) in warehouse club stores.
Need packaging that helps identify the product at the point of sale and adapts to the store format.

create.line1_html:
HELP MONSTER SNACKS
TO HAVE A GREAT DEBUT.

options.title: KRAFT PAPER
bullets: When printed, some colors can become dull / low-contrast

options.title: BRAND'S LOGO
bullets: Identify products from the same family

options.title: PRODUCT'S CHARACTERISTICS
bullets: Guide the buyer to what they need
Good support for new products in the market

options.title: KEY DIFFERENTIATOR / SLOGAN
bullets: Connect with consumers with brand awareness
